title: Gradient-Based Learning Applied to Document Recognition
authors: Yann LeCun, Léon Bottou, Yoshua Bengio, Patrick Haffner
summary: This paper introduces the MNIST handwritten digit dataset and demonstrates how gradient-based learning with convolutional neural networks can effectively solve image classification tasks. It established a standard benchmark for evaluating classification algorithms.

title: Why millennials and gen Z are silently leaving their jobs? Unraveling the 'quiet quitting' trend
authors: Nuryanti Taufik, Agi Rosyadi, Muhammad Aliyuddin
method: Survey + Structural Equation Modelling (SEM) with AMOS
tags: quiet quitting, empowering leadership, job satisfaction, organizational culture, work overload, millennials, gen Z, Indonesia
summary: Investigates quiet quitting behavior in Indonesian millennial and Gen Z workers using SEM on 600 respondents. Finds that job satisfaction negatively predicts quiet quitting, while empowering leadership and positive organizational culture boost satisfaction, and work overload suppresses it.
